project.name: Flow
project.summary: Flow is a production agent-tooling repository for canonical Sylphx agent assets, runtime projections, and the @sylphx/flow CLI.
goals: Own canonical agent assets under packages/flow/assets/.
Own the Flow CLI, runtime projection logic, docs, package release workflow, and admission workflow.
Keep agent identity, standards, and skills single-sourced and projected into runtime-specific layouts without creating prompt islands.
nonGoals: Own individual product repos' local project facts, deployment paths, or customer-specific behavior.
Duplicate Builder identity, standards, or skills in runtime-specific directories.
Treat source revert as complete recovery after package publish or agent-runtime projection behavior is released.

owns.name: canonical-agent-assets
owns.description: Agent identities, standards, skills, and reusable assets under packages/flow/assets/.

owns.name: runtime-projections
owns.description: Flow CLI logic that projects canonical assets into supported AI coding-tool runtime layouts.

doesNotOwn: Individual product repos' local project facts, deployment paths, or customer-specific behavior.
Enterprise doctrine repository content unless explicitly imported as a public dependency.
Third-party AI coding tools outside Flow's documented projection adapters.

allowedDependencies.surface: ADR-29 admission action and reusable release workflow

forbiddenCouplings: Do not create runtime-specific prompt islands that duplicate canonical Flow assets.
Do not add product-specific behavior to canonical agent identity, standards, or skills without a documented public extension point.
Do not publish package/projection behavior without release proof and projection smoke tests.

delivery.deployPath: Central reusable release workflow publishes the @sylphx/flow package from main release intent.
delivery.productionProof: Admission contexts, CI fan-in/postsubmit proof, npm package readback, projection smoke tests, and docs readback.

packageRelease.releaseIntent: Changesets capture package release intent and the reusable release workflow publishes changed packages.
packageRelease.versionPr: Version PR and changelog changes are produced by the reusable release workflow.
packageRelease.publisher: SylphxAI/.github reusable release workflow with inherited repository secrets.
packageRelease.publishProof: npm package readback for @sylphx/flow plus projection smoke evidence.

gaps.description: ADR-29 admission actions currently run in observe mode in the workflow; decide when this repo should enforce admission.
Make Codex/Claude/OpenCode projection smoke proof first-class release evidence.
